allow: Bash(npx shadcn@latest add button input card table dialog form label textarea select badge tabs dropdown-menu separator skeleton toast -y)

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Initial commit: RFP Engine SaaS with AI-powered requirement extraction

Core Features:
- PDF and DOCX document parsing for RFP extraction
- AI-powered requirement extraction using GPT-4o-mini
- AI draft response generation using GPT-3.5-turbo
- User authentication with NextAuth.js \(credentials provider\)
- Project management dashboard

Requirement Classification System:
- Layer 1 \(RequirementType\): PROCEDURAL, DECLARATIVE, DESCRIPTIVE, EVIDENCE_BASED
  - Controls response formatting, textarea size, and placeholder text
- Layer 2 \(DomainContext\): FEATURE, PROCESS, LEGAL
  - Controls tone, guardrails, and allowed language
  - LEGAL domain requires manual review flag

AI Response Quality:
- Canonical template system \(17 pre-defined templates\) to reduce AI costs
- Anti-overclaiming guardrails with hedged language enforcement
- Fluff removal post-processing
- Domain-specific rules \(Process: timeframe ranges, Legal: restrained/precise\)
- [DRAFT] tag appended to all generated responses

UI Components:
- Compliance matrix with expandable requirements
- Visual matrix overview with clickable requirement blocks
- Requirement type badges with color coding
- Domain context indicators \(F/P/L circles with review flags\)
- Company name replacement in draft responses
- Filter by status \(all/unanswered/partial/answered\)

Tech Stack:
- Next.js 16 with App Router
- TypeScript
- Prisma ORM with PostgreSQL
- Tailwind CSS with shadcn/ui components
- OpenAI API integration

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
